prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-HUNTKNF-LIBEAG Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: American Flag Fixed Blade Hunting Knife Patriotic Gift Liberty Eagle Description: This ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a majestic design with a beautiful bald eagle overlaid with the American Flag, making this a great patriotic gift for men. The eagle is also depicted on the handle of the blade, and the pommel is shaped like an eagle's head, perfect for any knife enthusiast's collection.

The knife is designed for display but also features an ergonomic handle that will keep the blade from slipping during use. Ergonomic handles are great for hunters and those who rely on their blades being easy and comfortable to use in the field.

In addition to being a great collector's item, the ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a straight-back blade that is particularly popular for survival-style knives because it is excellent for slicing since the majority of the blade is simple to maintain along a cut line. They are also easy to sharpen since they only feature a single curve along the front.

Each knife measures 13.5" in length, making it the perfect size for a knife display case or collection shelf. The stainless steel blade itself features a Damascus steel design that gives the knife a classic Damascus hunting knife look. Make sure to grab one of these knives for a gift or for your own collection. Search Terms: collector knife set fixed blade hunting knives with sheath patriotic american flag gifts for men gift sets outdoorsman tactical gear ornamental ornate dagger Features: - PATRIOTIC KNIFE GIFT - This ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a majestic design with a beautiful bald eagle overlaid with the American Flag, making this a great patriotic gift for men. The eagle is also depicted on the handle of the blade, and the pommel is shaped like an eagle's head, perfect for any knife enthusiast's collection. - ERGONOMIC HANDLE - The knife is designed for display, but also features an ergonomic handle that will keep the blade from slipping during use. Ergonomic handles are great for hunters and those who rely on their blades being easy and comfortable to use in the field. - STRAIGHT-BACK BLADE - In addition to being a great collector's item, the ASR Outdoor hunting knife features a straight-back blade that is particularly popular for survival-style knives because it is excellent for slicing since the majority of the blade is simple to maintain along a cut line. They are also easy to sharpen since they only feature a single curve along the front. - IDEAL SIZE FOR DISPLAY - Each knife measures 13.5" in length, making it the perfect size for a knife display case or collection shelf. The stainless steel blade itself features a Damascus steel design that gives the knife a classic Damascus hunting knife look. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: stainless steel that won't rust; Colors: American flag/eagle, assorted; Dimensions: 13.5" overall length; Plastic sheath included; Designed for display === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 13.5in American Flag Eagle Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor American Flag Fixed Blade Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Patriotic Eagle Design, Damascus Steel Blade, Ergonomic Handle, Display Ready, Stainless Steel, Straight-Back Blade

openai.title_differentiation: Damascus Finish, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle, Straight-Back Blade, Stainless Steel, Plastic Sheath
